header.pollen-transfer-enable_title: Use Pollen network discovery and storage handoff
header.pollen-transfer-disable_title: Stop Pollen network discovery and storage handoff

instructions.no-peers-title: Open MeshDrop on other devices to send files
instructions.no-peers-subtitle: Pair devices or enter a public room to be discoverable on other networks
instructions.x-instructions_desktop: Click to send files or right click to send a message
instructions.x-instructions_mobile: Tap to send files or long tap to send a message
instructions.activate-share-mode-base: Open MeshDrop on other devices to send
instructions.webrtc-requirement: To use this MeshDrop instance, WebRTC must be enabled!

footer.on-this-network_title: Same-instance Clearnet discovery is active. The Clearnet file-route toggle controls same-instance and direct Nostr-signaled WebRTC transfer routes.
footer.webrtc-discovery_title: Nostr is discovery and signaling, not the file-byte transport. The Clearnet file-route toggle can exclude direct Nostr-signaled WebRTC without turning off Nostr discovery.
footer.fips-discovery_title: You can be discovered through FIPS mesh signaling. Current WebRTC data still follows browser ICE unless a FIPS relay candidate exists.
footer.pollen-discovery_title: You can be discovered through Pollen mesh signaling. Current WebRTC data still follows browser ICE unless a Pollen relay candidate exists.
footer.paired-devices_title: You can be discovered by paired devices at all times independent of the network.
footer.public-room-devices_title: You can be discovered by devices in this public room independent of the network.

dialogs.input-key-on-this-device: Input this key on another device
dialogs.enter-key-from-another-device: Enter key from another device here.
dialogs.input-room-id-on-another-device: Input this room ID on another device
dialogs.enter-room-id-from-another-device: Enter room ID from another device to join room.
dialogs.auto-accept-instructions-2: to automatically accept all files sent from that device.
dialogs.public-room-qr-code_title: Click to copy link to public room
dialogs.pair-devices-qr-code_title: Click to copy link to pair this device
dialogs.share-text-checkbox: Always show this dialog when sharing text

about.claim: The easiest way to transfer files across devices

notifications.display-name-changed-temporarily: Display name is changed for this session only
notifications.display-name-random-again: Display name is randomly generated again
notifications.pairing-tabs-error: Pairing two web browser tabs is impossible
notifications.pair-url-copied-to-clipboard: Link to pair this device copied to clipboard
notifications.room-url-copied-to-clipboard: Link to public room copied to clipboard
notifications.notifications-permissions-error: Notifications permission has been blocked as the user has dismissed the permission prompt several times. This can be reset in Page Info which can be accessed by clicking the lock icon next to the URL bar.
notifications.link-received: Link received by {{name}} - Click to open
notifications.message-received: Message received by {{name}} - Click to copy
notifications.copied-text-error: Writing to clipboard failed. Copy manually!
notifications.online-requirement-pairing: You need to be online to pair devices
notifications.online-requirement-public-room: You need to be online to create a public room
notifications.nostr-extension-required: Install or enable a NIP-07 Nostr extension to use Nostr identity
notifications.nostr-remote-signer-unavailable: Remote signer pairing is not configured yet
notifications.nostr-mesh-identity-required: Connect a Nostr identity before enabling Nostr discovery
notifications.nostr-mesh-webrtc-required: WebRTC must be available for Nostr discovery
notifications.nostr-mesh-runtime-unsupported: This runtime does not support Nostr WebRTC discovery
notifications.nostr-mesh-encryption-required: Nostr discovery requires NIP-04 encryption from your signer
notifications.nostr-mesh-relay-error: Nostr discovery could not connect to a relay
notifications.fips-discovery-server-required: Configure FIPS_DISCOVERY or FIPS_CONTROL_SOCKET before enabling FIPS discovery
notifications.fips-discovery-unavailable: FIPS daemon is not reachable from this MeshDrop server
notifications.blossom-transfer-identity-required: Connect a Nostr identity before enabling Blossom transfers
notifications.blossom-transfer-server-required: Configure BLOSSOM_SERVERS before enabling Blossom transfers
notifications.blossom-transfer-runtime-unsupported: This runtime does not support Blossom transfers
notifications.blossom-transfer-webcrypto-required: Encrypted Blossom transfers require Web Crypto. Open MeshDrop over HTTPS or localhost.
notifications.hashtree-transfer-identity-required: Connect a Nostr identity before enabling Hashtree transfers
notifications.hashtree-transfer-server-required: Configure BLOSSOM_SERVERS before enabling Hashtree transfers
notifications.hashtree-transfer-runtime-unsupported: This runtime does not support Hashtree transfers
notifications.pollen-transfer-enabled: Pollen storage handoff and mesh discovery enabled
notifications.pollen-transfer-disabled: Pollen storage handoff and mesh discovery disabled
notifications.pollen-transfer-server-required: Enable POLLEN_TRANSFER before using Pollen transfers
notifications.pollen-transfer-unavailable: Pollen daemon is not reachable from this MeshDrop server
notifications.ios-memory-limit: Sending files to iOS is only possible up to 200 MB at once
notifications.unfinished-transfers-warning: There are unfinished transfers. Are you sure you want to close MeshDrop?
notifications.rate-limit-join-key: Rate limit reached. Wait 10 seconds and try again.

peer-ui.click-to-send: Click to send files or right click to send a message
peer-ui.connection-hash: To verify the security of the end-to-end encryption, compare this security number on both devices
